claim: stronger-closer trial RESULT (both tiers, live, surface stamp 09b93e3e54d0f1f1 shared): NOT unblocked at either tier. Sonnet W/S1/D correct = 0/0/0 of 64; Opus = 0/0/1; every S1-W Newcombe interval includes 0, the lone Opus-D win (1/64) within noise. OUTCOME 3 both tiers; outcome 4 (tier split) REFUTED. The composed cell claim capability-under-degradation-is-a-reasoner-question is REFUTED for the Haiku->Sonnet->Opus ladder at these roles: the bottleneck is the CHECKER not the tier (a stronger reasoner over corrupted premises + corrupted confirmation cannot convert to a correct sign). w gradient falls with tier (Sonnet 0.141->0.063->0.016) confirming a strong closer starves the deferred tradeoff. Society stays abstention-dominated ~95%.
subject: stronger-closer-trial

claim: FINDING (stronger-closer trial, from clm-0023): capability under degradation is NOT gated by model tier — the composed cell framing of it as a reasoner question is REFUTED. A stronger reasoner across the Haiku->Sonnet->Opus ladder in the closing/adversary/searcher roles does not unblock signing at a degraded oracle (both tiers 0/64 for the strong closer+adversary arm; tier split refuted). The bottleneck under degradation is the CHECKER, not the reasoner tier: a stronger reasoner reasons over the same corrupted premises and needs the same corrupted confirmation to sign, so it cannot convert strength into a correct signature — the experiment founding thesis reaching the reasoner axis, past a point a better reasoner does not buy soundness against a bad checker. Scope: p=0.7, dev-8, N=64, these roles.
subject: stronger-closer-trial

claim: item 1 (demotion-event query) DONE: all 9 composed-cell games (5 resurrected wins + 4 attrition) are MECHANISM-CONFIRMED via a read-only demoted-2-backer-quorum check over the archived gated logs — every resurrected win preceded by a demoted quorum on the winning candidate (spoon@40, pencil@60/74), every attrition reached a demoted quorum that failed to oracle-confirm and abstained. claim: item 2 (capacity estimate) DONE — committee REFUTED the pure-capacity-ceiling framing: the note conflated the decoder open search-space entropy (~10-13 bits) with the channel bound H(X)=3 bits (the true 8-word dev-8 target). Against 3 bits, 1.9 bits does NOT forbid winning (~46% single-guess). The stronger-closer null is a JOINT channel+decoder ceiling: channel term reasoner-independent (Shannon 1956 — no tier manufactures channel bits, so W/S1/D null together), decoder/search term tier+protocol-dependent AND the SOLE cause at p=1.0 (6/52 with a perfect channel). Arithmetic, BSC reading, adaptivity resolution all verified sound. capacity-estimate.md reconciled to the decomposition. Item 3 falls back to the empirical staircase per the doc own fallback.
subject: capacity-estimate

claim: four-lens committee verdict REFUTED (pure capacity ceiling) / CORRECT_AND_STANDS (the arithmetic, BSC error-model reading, adaptivity resolution): the null is a joint channel+decoder ceiling, the surviving derived claim is that a stronger TIER cannot manufacture channel bits so W/S1/D null together; item-3 placement = empirical staircase p in {0.85,0.9,0.95,1.0} not a single derived cell, with pre-registered falsifiability-asymmetry + power (N=64 -> coarse monotonic ordering only) caveats; decisive separating experiment (reveal the target set) kept open.
subject: capacity-estimate

claim: item 3 (reveal-the-set) RESULT (live): revealing the 8-word candidate set UNBLOCKS at p=0.7 — B(revealed)=5/62 correct vs A(withheld)=0/64, Newcombe B-A=[0.008,0.175] excludes 0; A reproduces the stronger-closer D-Sonnet null exactly; all 5 wins oracle-confirmed, w unchanged (0.016 both) so genuine identification not brute-force. So the p=0.7 null was DECODER-bound (the open search, a protocol property = withheld set), NOT channel-bound: a stronger tier cannot collapse the search, revealing the set can. Confirms + quantifies the capacity decomposition; the joint ceiling yields to removing EITHER constraint (reveal->8% at p=0.7; perfect channel->12% at p=1.0). Refines the stronger-closer bottleneck-is-the-checker claim.

claim: Fresh-context pressure test of the verify-results signing design returned PROCEED_WITH_CHANGES: confirmed ResultsReceiptsSuite is genuinely in the sbt-check path and that retire is blocked for the immutable originals. Three must-fixes applied — provenance claims kept check:none (closed a fail-open where the gate would sign 'distilled from archive' on a check that never reads the archive); signed text cites the receipt name + body-sha256 (the config stamp 09b93e3e… is shared across three archives, not unique); and one about-linked signed claim per finding rather than superseding the immutable originals. Numbers-only scope validated; interpretations left unverified.

subject: fallible-oracle-composed-cell
claim: Read-only investigation of the archived seam-gated bodies (composed-cell e4666df175ff43e3) REFUTES the attrition half of clm-0025. The 4 attrition games (open won, gated lost) contain ZERO demoted-quorum lines ('backed by N' absent); they abstain on AMBIGUITY — 'rival hypotheses, no single leader' — as the cohort diverges into rival phrasings (dog/domestic dog, shoe/A shoe or boot, three toy phrasings). The 2-backer quorum lived in the OPEN arm (which signed via BackerQuorum); gating demoted THAT path. clm-0025's 'every attrition reached a demoted quorum that failed to oracle-confirm and abstained' conflates the open-arm quorum with the gated body. The resurrection half stands: all 6 gated wins reach backed-by-2 then -3 on the winning candidate before the oracle-confirmed SIGN.

subject: fallible-oracle-composed-cell
claim: CORRECTED clm-0025 (supersedes it). composed-cell (e4666df175ff43e3) demotion mechanism from the archived seam-gated bodies. RESURRECTION (unchanged): all 6 gated wins reach a demoted multi-backer quorum (backed by 2, then 3) on the winning candidate before the oracle-confirmed SIGN (spoon: asserts -> backed-by-1 -> corroborates -> backed-by-2 -> ... -> GUESS/SIGN); the seam-open arm would have signed at the 2-backer point, gating demotes it and the game survives to oracle confirmation. ATTRITION (fixed): the 4 games open won and gated lost did NOT reach a demoted quorum in the gated body; the gated arm, having demoted the open arm's 2-backer path, ran longer and the cohort diverged into rival phrasings, so it abstained on AMBIGUITY (cardinality>1) — the answer was present but fractured across phrasings. Gating's cost here is phrasing-divergence into an ambiguity block, not a quorum that failed to confirm. Interpretive mechanism claim, unverified; the header-level counts are signed (clm-0014/0044, clm-0015 two-lies below). A body-digest was assessed and deliberately not built (low value per parser risk; the essay's Finding-2 numbers are header-level).

subject: fallible-oracle-composed-cell

Numbers only — the 'gating keeps the question alive' reading stays unverified on clm-0015.

subject: diplomacy-implementation

claim: Lemma A.4 (monotone resolution): the commitment transition system sends each commitment along exactly one path proposed -> active -> {T,F,retired}; no constructor targets a resolved/retired commitment, so resolution is one-way and re-resolution unrepresentable.
subject: obligation-lemma-a4

claim: Obligation A.5 (restriction preservation): the eight results of calculus §§4-7 survive removing withdrawal for accepted commitments; the confluence statements quantify over rule sets, so the restriction must be checked against them rather than waved through. The one non-inherited proof.
subject: obligation-a5

claim: Proposition A.7 (reputation ordering agreement): the subjective-logic expectation and the Wilson-interval midpoint on k/(k+b) induce the same ordering on agents under equal priors, so no consumer can be gamed by choosing the friendlier lens.
subject: obligation-a7

claim: P1 — D1: reputation will predict survival, and the effect will be larger than most game-theory priors expect, because LLM agents (unlike Nash agents) read and react to stated histories.
subject: prediction-p1

claim: P2 — D2: the receipts agent will be preferred as an ally (higher alliance formation), and will suffer fewer betrayals, not more — receipts read as predictability, and predictable partners are valuable even to the selfish. Directional, falsifiable, and I note the respectable opposite prior: legible honesty paints a target.
subject: prediction-p2

claim: P3 — D3: deceiver tier will matter more than closer tier did in the last program (crafted lies are not channel noise) — but the commitment-tracking defense will flatten the tier gradient, because past resolutions are the one input the deceiver's eloquence cannot rewrite.
subject: prediction-p3

claim: P4 — somewhere in D1-D3, an agent will attempt to launder a broken commitment through renegotiation language after the horizon. The supersession-not-edit law exists for that moment; I predict we will watch it fire.
subject: prediction-p4
